title.ko: 수세변소(水洗便所) 또는 세정(洗淨) 장치를 갖는 소변소(小便所); 그를 위한 세정(洗淨) 밸브
title.en: WATER-CLOSETS OR URINALS WITH FLUSHING DEVICES; FLUSHING VALVES THEREFOR

definition.ko: 수세변소(水洗便所), 세정(洗淨)장치 일반적 구성 E03D1/00, E03D3/00 특수구조 E03D5/00, E03D7/00 부속품, 구성부재 E03D9/00, E03D11/00 소변소(小便所) E03D13/00

title.ko: 시스턴(Cistern)을 갖는 세정(洗淨) 장치
title.en: Water flushing devices with cisterns
Shape or selection of material for flushing cisterns
Details of shape of cisterns, e.g. for connecting to wall, for supporting or connecting flushing-device actuators

title.ko: 고가(高架) 수조식 세정 방식
title.en: High-level flushing systems
Cisterns with bell siphons
with movable siphon bells
Cisterns with tube siphons
with movable or deformable siphon tubes
Siphon action initiated by air or water pressure
Siphon action initiated by raising the water level in the cistern, e.g. by means of displacement members
Siphon action initiated by outlet of air

title.ko: 배수량이 여러가지로 변화되는 시스턴(이층식 또는 다층식의 세정 시스턴 E03D 1/22; 급수 계통의 압력 및 각종 배수량에 의하여 조작되는 세정 장치 E03D3/12)
title.en: Cisterns discharging variable quantities of water (twin or multiple flushing cisterns E03D0001220000;flushing devices operated by pressure of the water supply system and discharging variable quantities of water E03D0003120000)
Cisterns for periodical discharge
Cisterns empty when not in action
Cisterns with tiltably-mounted containers
Twin or multiple flushing cisterns

title.ko: 저위치(低位置) 수조식 세정 방식
title.en: Low-level flushing systems

title.ko: 변기(便器) 후방에 넓혀진 끝에 부착된 세정 시스턴을 갖는 수세변기(水洗便器)(시스턴의 형상 또는 소재 E03D1/01; 수세변기(水洗便器)의 구조상의 특징 E03D11/02 ～ E03D11/12)
title.en: Bowl with flushing cistern mounted on the rearwardly extending end of the bowl (shape or material of the cistern E03D0001010000;constructional features of the bowl E03D0011020000-E03D0011120000)
Bowl integral with the flushing cistern

title.ko: 고가(高架) 수조식 시스턴 또는 저위치(低位置) 수조식 시스턴용의 밸브; 그것들의 배치(유입 밸브, 밸브 일반 F16K)
title.en: Valves for high or low cisterns; Their arrangement (inlet valves, valves in general F16K)

title.ko: 주입밸브(流入辨)의 배치(소음(騷音) 장치 E03D9/14)
title.en: Arrangement of inlet valves (devices for reducing noise E03D0009140000)

title.ko: 부자(浮子)의 사용 또는 배치(작동 부자(浮子) 일반 F16K 33/00)
title.en: Adaptations or arrangements of floats (actuating-floats in general F16K0033000000)
Flushing valves for outlets; Arrangement of outlet valves
Flushing valves having buoyancy
Associated working of inlet and outlet valves

title.ko: 세정관(洗淨管)의 사용 또는 장치(배치에 의한 소음 흡수 수단 F16L 55/00)
title.en: Adaptations or arrangements of flushing pipes (noise-absorbing means in pipe systems F16L0055000000)

title.ko: 급수계(給水系)의 압력에 의하여 작동하는 세정 장치
title.en: Flushing devices operated by pressure of the water supply system

title.ko: 자동 폐지식 세정 밸브(자동 폐지식 밸브 일반 F16K 21/04)
title.en: Self-closing flushing valves (self-closing valves in general F16K0021040000)
with piston valve and pressure chamber for retarding the valve-closing movement
with diaphragm valve and pressure chamber for retarding the valve-closing movement
with other retarding devices
Flushing devices with pressure-operated reservoir, e.g. air chamber

title.ko: 배수량이 여러가지로 변화되는 세정 장치(배수량이 여러가지로 변화되는 세정 시스턴 E03D1/14)
title.en: Flushing devices discharging variable quantities of water (flushing cisterns discharging variable quantities of water E03D0001140000)

title.ko: 세정장치의 특수구조(자동차 또는 트레일러(trailer)용 B60R 15/00; 철도차량용 B61D 35/00; 선박용 B63B 29/14; 항공기용 B64D 11/02)
title.en: Special constructions of flushing devices (in motor vehicles or trailers B60R0015000000;in railway carriages B61D0035000000;in ships B63B0029140000;in aircraft B64D0011020000)
using flushing pumps

title.ko: 수세변기의 배출구에 가동폐지구(可動閉止具)로 연결되어 있는 것(저부(底部) 또는 배출구와 배출관 사이에 폐지구(閉止具)를 가진 수세변기 E03D 11/10)
title.en: combined with movable closure elements in the bowl outlet (bowls with closure elements between bottom or outlet and outlet pipe E03D0011100000)
with devices for separate removal of liquids and solids
with recirculation of bowl-cleaning fluid

title.ko: 기계적 또는 수력적(水力的)인 작동 방법을 취하는 것(E03D 5/01, E03D 5/12가 우선)
title.en: operated mechanically or hydraulically (E03D0005010000, E03D0005120000 take precedence)
directly by the seat or cover
directly by the door
directly by foot
directly by hand
the flushing element, e.g. siphon bell, being actuated through a lever
the flushing element, e.g. siphon bell, being actuated through a cable, chain, or the like

title.ko: 전기적인 작동 방법을 취하는 것(E03D 5/01, E03D 5/12가 우선)
title.en: operated electrically (E03D0005010000, E03D0005120000 take precedence)

title.ko: 주기적으로 배출시키는 것(주기적으로 배출시키는 고가(高架) 수조식 시스턴 E03D 1/16)
title.en: discharging periodically (high-level cisterns for periodical discharge E03D0001160000)

title.ko: 차륜이 붙은 변소(세정 장치를 갖지 않는 차륜이 붙은 변소 A47K 11/00; 지상 주행차의 구조 B62)
title.en: Wheeled lavatories (wheeled closets without flushing A47K0011000000;construction of land vehicles B62)

title.ko: 수세소용(水洗所用) 위생 기구 또는 기타 부속품 (화장실의 세기(洗器)를 청소하는 수도구(手道具) A47K 11/10; 변소의 좌석 또는 커버 A47K 13/00; 변소의 좌석 이외의 본체의 지지 A47K 17/02; 음료수 관의 오염 방지 장치 E03C 1/10)
title.en: Sanitary or other accessories for lavatories (hand tools for cleaning the toilet bowl A47K0011100000;seats or covers for closets A47K0013000000;body supports, other than seats, for closets A47K0017020000;devices for preventing contamination of drinking-water pipes E03C0001100000)

title.ko: 세정 탱크내의 물에 또는 세정시의 물에 소독제, 방취제 또는 세정제를 가하는 장치(소독 장치 일반 A61L 2/00; 수처리(水處理) 일반 C02F)
title.en: Devices adding a disinfecting, deodorising or cleaning agent to the water while flushing, or in the flushing tank (apparatus for disinfection of materials or objects in general A61L0002000000;treatment of water in general C02F)
consisting of a separate container with an outlet through which the agent is introduced into the flushing water, e.g. by suction

title.ko: 환기 장치의 특수한 배치 또는 조작(실내의 환기 일반 F24F)
title.en: Special arrangement or operation of ventilating devices (ventilating rooms in general F24F)
ventilating the bowl
using incorporated fans
Auxiliary chambers with water connection to the flushing pipe and adapted to receive utensils for bowl-cleaning, e.g. brushes

title.ko: 윗쪽으로 분사시키는 변기용의 장치; 윗쪽으로 분사시키도록 변형시킨 변기(샤워기 A47K 3/28; 특별한 치료 또는 위생을 목적으로 하는 욕실 설비 A61H 33/00, 인체의 특수한 부분을 위한 것 A61H 35/00)
title.en: Devices in the bowl producing upwardly-directed sprays; Modifications of the bowl for use with such devices (showers A47K0003280000;bathing devices for special therapeutic or hygienic purposes A61H0033000000, for specific parts of the body A61H0035000000)
Waste-disintegrating apparatus combined with the bowl
Means to prevent freezing of lavatories

title.ko: 세정 밸브에 연결된 소음 수단(배관 계통에 있어서의 소음 흡수단 F16L 55/00)
title.en: Noise-reducing means combined with flushing valves (noise-absorbing means in pipe systems F16L0055000000)
Water pressure regulating means in flushing pipes

title.ko: 변기의 다른 구성 부품 (관(管)의 이은 부분 또는 연결구 일반 F16L)
title.en: Other component parts of water-closets (pipe joints or couplings in general F16L)

title.ko: 변기 보울 (변기 청소기구용의 세정수와 연결된 보조실 9/06; 윗쪽으로 분사시키도록 변형된 것 E03D 9/08; 좌석 또는 커버 A47K 13/00)
title.en: Water-closet bowls (auxiliary chambers with connections to flushing water for bowl-cleaning utensils E03D0009060000;modified for using upwardly-directed sprays E03D0009080000;seats or covers A47K0013000000)
Bowls of flat shape with only slightly inclined bottom
Bowls with downwardly-extending flanges
Bowls with means producing a flushing water swirl
Bowls with closure elements provided between bottom or outlet and the outlet pipe; Bowls with pivotally supported inserts
Bowls combined with a reservoir, e.g. containing apparatus for disinfecting or for disintegrating
Swivel-mounted bowls, e.g. for use in restricted spaces
Parts or details of bowls; Special adaptations of pipe joints or couplings for use with bowls
Means for connecting the bowl to the wall, e.g. to a wall outlet
Means for connecting the bowl to the floor, e.g. to a floor outlet
Means for connecting the bowl to the flushing pipe

title.ko: 화장실용 사이폰(Siphons) F16L 43/00, F16L 45/00
title.en: Siphons (for pipes in general F16L0043000000, F16L0045000000)

title.ko: 소변기 (세정 장치가 없는 것 A47K 11/00)
title.en: Urinals (without flushing devices A47K0011000000)
